issues.description: Condition uses 'HasRestingDon' but card text states '[DON!! x1]' which means the card itself requires 1 DON attached. Should use 'HasAttachedDon' with count:1 on the card itself, not a resting DON check.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is incomplete. The card text specifies 'up to 1', so maxCount:1 must be added to the target object to enforce the 'up to 1' limit.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] [Once Per Turn] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less.
